name: Producer
summary: Steers resources, deals, risk and the overall shape of the project.

name: Director
summary: Owns the creative whole: tone, rhythm, staging and performances.

name: Screenwriter
summary: Shapes the story: structure, characters, dialogue and theme.

name: Cinematographer
summary: Shapes the image through light, lenses, framing and movement.

name: Editor
summary: Shapes time: pacing, rhythm and the final form of the film.

name: Composer
summary: Shapes feeling through theme, mood and musical identity.

name: Sound Designer
summary: Shapes the world through space, presence, danger and realism.

name: Production Designer
summary: Shapes the environment: period, class, credibility and symbolism.

name: Casting Director
summary: Shapes who the characters become on screen and the chemistry between them.

name: Location Manager
summary: Connects the story to real places and manages their logistics and cost.

name: Marketer
summary: Shapes how the film meets its audience: trailer, target group and expectation.
